prompt: A high-quality 3D animated cinematic shot of a {argument name="left character" default="black and white tuxedo cat police officer"} extending a white-gloved hand for a handshake to a tall, {argument name="right character" default="stylish anthropomorphic blonde fox"}. The fox is smirking with one hand in his pocket, wearing a {argument name="fox outfit" default="teal open shirt over a white t-shirt, white pants, and a gold chain"}. They are standing in a modern, upscale office lobby. On the left wall, a metallic 3D star logo reads "{argument name="company name" default="Paw Star ENTERTAINMENT"}" above a sleek reception desk. The background features a black leather sofa, a potted plant, and wall decor including {argument name="background decor" default="3 framed gold records and 2 framed posters featuring the fox"}. The image features detailed fur textures, realistic clothing materials, and soft, professional studio lighting typical of modern animated feature films.
translatedPrompt: 一个高质量的 3D 动画电影镜头，画面中一位 {argument name="left character" default="黑白燕尾服猫警官"} 伸出戴着白手套的手，正准备与一位高挑的 {argument name="right character" default="时尚拟人化金发狐狸"} 握手。狐狸嘴角带着一丝坏笑，一只手插在口袋里，身穿 {argument name="fox outfit" default="白色 T 恤外搭青色开衫、白色长裤，并佩戴一条金项链"}。他们站在一个现代化的豪华办公大厅中。左侧墙壁上，一个金属质感的 3D 星形标志写着 "{argument name="company name" default="Paw Star ENTERTAINMENT"}"，下方是一个时尚的前台接待处。背景中设有黑色真皮沙发、盆栽植物以及墙面装饰，包括 {argument name="background decor" default="3 张镶框金唱片和 2 张印有狐狸形象的镶框海报"}。画面呈现出细腻的毛发质感、逼真的衣物材质，以及现代动画长片中常见的柔和专业摄影棚灯光。

breakdown.creativeCore: 3D 动画风格动物办公室邂逅：生成一个电影级 3D 动画风格场景，展示两只拟人化动物在现代企业大厅中的互动。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, 3d, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
